docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, ELVIA AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, EMMA AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
